entries.notes: Q4K fused path with F32 output for accuracy-focused runs.
Default Gemma 2 Q4K dequant path for baseline F16 activation workflows.
Subgroup-free Gemma 2 Q4K dequant path with F32 activations. Still requires shader-f16 kernels.
Legacy alias for gemma2-q4k-dequant-f32a-nosubgroups.
Gemma 2 F16 default for F16 activation kernels.
Gemma 2 F16 default path with F32 activation for accuracy-first runs.
Experimental fused F16 pipeline variant for fast decode.
Experimental fused F32 pipeline variant for fast decode.
Gemma 3 F16/F32 online path with streaming prefill attention instead of the small-tile prefill kernel.
Experimental Gemma 3 Q4K path using online decode attention on subgroup-capable GPUs.
Subgroup-free Gemma 3 Q4K dequant path with F32 activations. Still requires shader-f16 kernels.
Legacy alias for gemma3-q4k-dequant-f32a-nosubgroups.
Gemma 3 Q4K dequant default: subgroup GEMV + online attention + tuned lm_head multicol, F32 activations.
Diagnostic: same as gemma3-q4k-dequant-f32a-online but uses attention_small_f16kv.wgsl for prefill to isolate streaming attention bug.
Gemma 3 Q4K dequant path that keeps matmul weights in F32 and runs F32 matmul kernels for numeric-sensitivity debugging.
LFM2 Q4K default: subgroup GEMV decode with tiled fast-prefill path and F32 activations.
Subgroup-free LFM2 Q4K dequant path with F32 activations and tiled prefill. Still requires shader-f16 kernels.
Qwen 3/3.5 Q4K default: subgroup GEMV + online attention + tiled prefill, F16 activations. Linear attention layers bypass this path.
Qwen 3/3.5 Q4K accuracy-first variant: subgroup GEMV + online attention + tiled prefill, F32 activations. Linear attention layers bypass this path.
EmbeddingGemma default path for F16 weights with F32 activation.
EmbeddingGemma default F32 path.
EmbeddingGemma Q4K dequant path with F32 activation.
